handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260406 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU9000001"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1}
client req_fundamental_data {"req_id":"$req1"}
server fundamental_data {"req_id":"$req1","data":"<ReportSnapshot><Company><CoIDs><CoID Type=\"Ticker\">AAPL</CoID></CoIDs></Company></ReportSnapshot>"}
disconnect
